creator: arcade@b1t.name
text:
This port is outdated, maintainer can't be contacted and domain with distfiles and maintainer contact email is unavailable.

Today I received two requests for tkabber ports:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/188257
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/188256

This brings tkabber to new version deprecating this port. Can this port be romved please?
